name: fanflow-root
description: Fanflow: GenAI-enabled Stadium Operations & Fan Concierge platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix server && npm run test:coverage --prefix client
